contents:
محتوى تدوينة تجريبي. يشبه لوريم إيبسوم لكنه يقول شيئاً أكثر فائدة.
We will show some content that is supported:
Basic Syntax Headings Copy # Heading 1 ## Heading 2 ### Heading 3 #### Heading 4 ##### Heading 5 ###### Heading 6 Heading 2 Heading 3 Heading 4 Heading 5 Heading 6 Emphasis Copy *This text will be italic* _This will also be italic_ **This text will be bold** __This will also be bold__ _You **can** combine them_ This text will be italic
This will also be italic
This text will be bold
This will also be bold
You can combine them
Lists Unordered Copy * Item 1 * Item 2 * Item 2a * Item 2b Item 1 Item 2 Item 2a Item 2b Ordered Copy 1. Item 1 2. Item 2 3. Item 3 1. Item 3a 2. Item 3b Nested This is an unordered list sample 1 This is an unordered list sample 2 This is an unordered indented list sample 1 This is an unordered indented list sample 2 This is an ordered list sample 1 This is an ordered list sample 2 This is an ordered indented list sample 1 This is an ordered indented list sample 2 Images Copy ![GitHub Logo](https://github.githubassets.com/images/modules/logos_page/GitHub-Mark.png) Links Copy [Hugo](https://gohugo.io) Hugo
Blockquotes Copy As Newton said: > If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of Giants. If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of Giants.
Inline Code Copy Inline `code` has `back-ticks around` it. Inline code has back-ticks around it.
Code Blocks Syntax Highlighting Copy ```go func main() { fmt.Println("Hello World") } ``` Copy func main() { fmt.Println("Hello World") } Tables Copy | Syntax | Description | | --------- | ----------- | | Header | Title | | Paragraph | Text | Syntax Description Header Title Paragraph Text References Markdown Syntax Hugo Markdown
title: محتوى تجريبي: أنماط التنسيق
